Bus Timings

Bus Stop at Terminus 1, Al Nahda 1 in Dubai

March 20, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Al Nahda 1, Terminus 1 Bus Stop is a crucial transportation hub in Dubai, offering convenient access to various destinations. Its strategic location in the heart of Al Nahda 1 makes it a popular choice for both residents and visitors seeking public transportation options. With multiple bus routes servicing the stop, commuters can easily connect to different parts of the city.

Address

Al Nahda - Dubai - United Arab Emirates

Map

View on Google Maps here.

Situated in the heart of Al Nahda 1, the Terminus 1 Bus Stop is a vital transportation hub connecting residents and visitors to various destinations across Dubai. Its strategic location offers easy access to a plethora of amenities, making it a convenient starting point for exploring the city.

Bus Routes and Timings

The Al Nahda 1, Terminus 1 Bus Stop is serviced by multiple bus routes, ensuring connectivity to different parts of Dubai.

Bus Route Bus Station Timings

F23 Al Nahda 1 7:55 PM
24 Al Nahda 2 7:57 PM

F23 Al Nahda 1 9:26 PM
22 Al Nahda 1 9:26 PM
F23 Al Nahda 1 9:38 PM

Bus Route Details

The Al Warqa’a, Mass Supermarket Bus Stop is served by several bus routes, each offering frequent and reliable service throughout the day.

  • F23 Route: This route connects Al Warqa’a with Al Nahda 1, Terminus. Buses start at 05:13 AM and run approximately every 15 minutes until 08:42 PM. The final bus departs at 08:29 PM.

  • 20A Route: Serving Al Warsan 3 and RTA Staff Accommodation, this route begins service at 05:34 AM with buses running every 30 minutes. The last bus leaves at 03:05 PM.
  • 24 Route: Running between Al Nahda, The Sheffield Private School 1 and Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre, this route operates from 05:36 AM, with frequent buses every 15 minutes. Service continues until 03:51 PM.
  • X22 Route: Connecting Business Bay Metro Landside and Al Qusais Industrial Area 2 Terminus, the X22 route starts at 06:12 AM, with buses every 15 minutes until 08:00 PM.
  • F23A Route: This route provides service to Stadium Bus Station. Buses start at 06:13 AM and operate every 15 minutes throughout the day, with the last bus at 04:32 PM.

Each route offers specific destinations and times, ensuring convenient and efficient travel options for various needs.

Nearby Destinations

You’ll find a variety of amenities, dining options, and services within easy reach. Highlights include:

Dining

  • Madras Vegetarian Restaurant: Delight in flavorful vegetarian dishes with a traditional touch.

  • Grill Hut Restaurant: Enjoy a range of grilled specialties in a relaxed setting.
  • Miya Bhai Restaurant: Known for its authentic cuisine and welcoming atmosphere.
  • Additional Local Eateries: Discover more dining options nearby for a range of culinary experiences.

Shopping

  • Authentic Store LLC: Browse a selection of unique and high-quality products.

  • Unif Unique Gents Salon: Find grooming and personal care services with a distinctive flair.
  • Areej Shopping Centre: Shop for a variety of items from fashion to essentials in this local center.
  • Other Nearby Retailers: Explore additional stores for a broader shopping experience.

Healthcare Facilities

  • Eatemad Home Health Care: Provides home-based medical services for your convenience.

  • IMARA Healthcare UAE: Access a range of healthcare services and expert consultations.
  • Additional Healthcare Providers: Benefit from other nearby medical facilities for comprehensive care.

Pharmacies

  • Al Farah Pharmacy Med7 Dubai: A well-stocked pharmacy offering essential medications.

  • Novo Nahda Sahara Pharmacy: Provides a wide range of pharmaceutical products and services.
  • Additional Local Pharmacies: Conveniently located options for all your healthcare needs.

Accommodation

  • Emirates Star Hotel Apartments: Comfortable and well-equipped apartments for a pleasant stay.

  • Lavender Hotel Apartments: Offers convenient and affordable lodging options nearby.
  • Additional Hotels and Apartments: Explore more accommodation choices in the vicinity.

Nearby Stops

  1. Al Nahda 1, Terminus 2(113m): 20A, 20B, 22, 107, F23, F23A X22

  2. Al Nahda 1, Fatma Mohammad Masjid 1(206m): 24

  3. Al Nahda 1, Fatma Mohammad Masjid 2(209m): 19

  4. Al Nahda 1, Burj Al Noor 1(262m): 19, 20A, 22, 24, F23, F23A, X22

  5. Al Khalifa Saif Building 1(311m): 19

The Al Nahda 1, Terminus 1 Bus Stop is more than just a transit point; it’s a gateway to exploring Dubai’s vibrant culture and attractions. Its proximity to essential amenities, such as shopping centers, restaurants, and healthcare facilities, enhances its value as a community hub. Whether you’re commuting to work, visiting family and friends, or embarking on a city tour, this bus stop is your starting point for a seamless journey.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
